gpu_info.gpu_name: NVIDIA RTX PRO 6000 Blackwell Server Edition

notes.official_trainer: The wrapper calls the official OpenVLA finetune.py script through subprocess.
notes.split_patch: OPENVLA_EPISODE_SPLIT_JSON is used by the patched official dataset.py loader.
notes.lora_alpha_note: Official OpenVLA finetune.py exposes lora_rank and lora_dropout, but not lora_alpha. lora_alpha is recorded for project metadata.
notes.logging_note: The wrapper captures stdout and parses available loss, step, gradient, and learning-rate fields. Missing fields are kept as null rather than guessed.

command: torchrun --standalone --nnodes 1 --nproc-per-node 1 /root/autodl-tmp/openvla/vla-scripts/finetune.py --vla_path /root/autodl-tmp/hf_cache/hub/models--openvla--openvla-7b/snapshots/47a0ec7fc4ec123775a391911046cf33cf9ed83f --data_root_dir /root/autodl-tmp/datasets/openvla_modified_libero_rlds --dataset_name modified_libero_all_no_noops --run_root_dir /root/autodl-tmp/openvla_efficiency_project/adapters/df_04_01_lora_full_train_seed42_rank32 --adapter_tmp_dir /root/autodl-tmp/openvla_efficiency_project/adapters/df_04_01_lora_full_train_seed42_rank32/adapter_tmp --batch_size 16 --max_steps 200000 --save_steps 5000 --learning_rate 0.0005 --grad_accumulation_steps 1 --image_aug True --shuffle_buffer_size 100000 --save_latest_checkpoint_only True --use_lora True --lora_rank 32 --lora_dropout 0.0 --use_quantization False --wandb_project openvla_efficiency --run_id_note df_04_01_lora_full_train_seed42_rank32
